title: Extractor Wiring, PowerFlags, DepthController, Hierarchical Decomposition
summary: Wired the Session 30 extraction pipeline (YouTube, arXiv, PDF, EPUB) into the investigate/compare commands. Added PowerFlags (--deep:N, --sources, --cite, --verify), DepthController with n-gram convergence detection, hierarchical decomposition for deep investigations (>8 dimensions), and trust-weighted synthesis with citation/verification modes.

parts_completed.A: Wire extractors into investigate — search_and_extract(), source_types on ResearchDimension, extractor dispatch in _research_one()
parts_completed.B1: PowerFlags dataclass + parse_deep_flag + parse_sources_flag + CLI wiring for investigate/compare
parts_completed.C_lite: Trust-weighted evaluator — _CITATION_INSTRUCTIONS and _VERIFICATION_INSTRUCTIONS injected into synthesis prompt when --cite/--verify set
parts_completed.D: DepthController — n-gram novelty tracking with convergence-based stopping (novelty_threshold, max_rounds, declining trend detection)
parts_completed.E: Hierarchical decomposition — _plan_hierarchical() for --deep:N > 8; two-phase: core dims via MID tier → sub-dims via FAST tier

parts_deferred_to_session_32.G: octane recall command — infer from stored data only

new_classes.name: PowerFlags
new_classes.purpose: Unified config dataclass for power command flags (deep, sources, cite, verify)

new_classes.name: DepthController
new_classes.purpose: N-gram novelty tracking with convergence-based stopping for iterative deepening

new_functions.name: search_and_extract
new_functions.purpose: Query-based search across source types (arxiv, youtube) → extract content from top results

new_functions.name: parse_deep_flag
new_functions.purpose: Parse --deep flag value (None, '', '8', ':12') into int | None

new_functions.name: _plan_hierarchical
new_functions.purpose: Two-phase hierarchical planning for deep investigations (> 8 dimensions)

new_functions.name: _search_extract_arxiv
new_functions.purpose: Search arXiv by query, download top papers, extract text

new_functions.name: _search_extract_youtube
new_functions.purpose: Search YouTube by query, get transcripts from top videos

dataclass_changes.change: Added reliability_score: float and sources: list[str] fields
Now includes source_types in serialized dimensions

method_signature_changes.change: Added cite, verify parameters; injects citation/verification instructions
Now dispatches to search_and_extract() for arxiv/youtube source_types

architecture_flow.before_s31: octane investigate → DimensionPlanner → WebAgent only → Evaluator synthesis
architecture_flow.after_s31: octane investigate --sources arxiv,youtube --cite → DimensionPlanner (with source_types) → WebAgent + ExtractorPipeline (search_and_extract) → Trust-weighted synthesis with citations
